title: Per-Call Reliability Characterisation
hypothesis: A MockLLMClient with fail_after=3 will produce exactly 3 successful calls followed by exactly 1 LLMClientError, giving a success rate of 3/4 = 0.7500, reproducibly across all 10 trial repetitions.
